blockers: SynLoc benchmark materialization is still missing. The vendored `sskit` checkout now exists under backend/third_party/soccernet/sskit and the repo-owned SynLoc evaluator/export bridge is present, but the official SoccerNet downloader for `SpiideoSynLoc` immediately prompts for `research.spiideo.com` credentials on this machine before any `valid.zip` or `annotations.zip` archive can be fetched, so no local evaluator-ready dataset root is materialized under backend/benchmarks/_datasets/loc.synloc_quick_v1.
